problem_solved: Clinicians need rapid access to evidence-based clinical information at the point of care to make informed treatment decisions
solution_description: Leading evidence-based clinical decision support database with 7,600+ expert clinicians, editors, and reviewers. Provides drug information (UpToDate Lexidrug), patient engagement (Emmi), and CME/CE/CPD credits. Available in EHR, mobile, and remote locations
traction_signals: Trusted by 3+ million health professionals worldwide
100+ research studies proving improved health outcomes
CME/CE/CPD credits accepted by dozens of accrediting organizations
Wolters Kluwer ownership provides enterprise stability
notes: Gold standard for clinical decision support. Strong evidence base with academic rigor. Enterprise and pro suites available. Global reach with multi-language support potential
